summary: Frontend QA of role/permissions fix in /user/new (UserConfig.js). Logged in as admin PIN 11338585, navigated to /user/new (NOTE: actual route is /user/:userId, the spec's /settings/users/new redirects). Verified all role badges show correct preset permission counts and that selecting a role auto-loads permissions (toast confirms count). Verified Create/Edit Puesto dialogs include the editable permissions section with 6 categories.

ui_bugs.issue: Hydration error: <button> nested inside <button> — the edit pencil <button> is nested inside the role <button> at lines 728-761. Console emits 'In HTML, <button> cannot be a descendant of <button>'. Should be refactored to use <span role=button> or move pencil outside.

A leftover custom role 'ADMINISTRADOR' (code=administrador, level 80, 0p) appears next to the builtin 'Administrador'. Dedup filter only blocks code=='admin' (line 712), not 'administrador'. Recommendation: also dedup case-insensitive label OR filter custom roles whose name matches a builtin label, OR delete this seed row from DB.

Builtin 'Administrador' shows 63p · N100. Spec expected 70p. Backend returns 70 perms but frontend ROLE_DEFAULTS.admin is computed from PERMISSION_CATEGORIES (49 cats actually = 14+6+14+4+9+16 = 63). ROLE_DEFAULTS frontend is OUT OF SYNC with backend DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS for admin (frontend dictionary is missing 7 permission keys present in backend). This affects badge display only.
Missing aria-describedby/Description on Create/Edit Role dialogs (Radix warning).

qa_results.QA4_gerente_31p: PASS — badge shows 'GERENTE 31p · N60' (custom role with CUSTOM_ROLE_DEFAULTS fallback)
qa_results.QA6_badges_show_count: PASS for all roles (admin=63p, waiter=3p, cashier=12p, supervisor=16p, kitchen=2p, gerente=31p, propietario=41p). Note: admin spec was 70 but frontend dict produces 63 — see ui_bug above.
qa_results.QA7_create_dialog_categories: PASS — Create Puesto dialog shows 6 expandable categories (Ventas 0/14, Mesas 0/6, Administracion 0/14, Inventario 0/4, Configuracion 0/9, Pestañas de Configuracion 0/16) with switches for each permission
qa_results.QA8_create_TestQA: PARTIAL — TestQA_Auto role was created and appears in role list with 'TestQA_Auto 0p · N20'. The 0p resulted from a test-script issue (clicked category buttons collapsed the initially-open Ventas section before toggling switches). Dialog functionality and POST /api/roles itself worked (role saved + appears in list).
qa_results.QA9_edit_dialog: PASS — Edit Puesto dialog opens with correct fields (name input, level select), 6 expandable permission categories (same as create), switches togglable, and 'Guardar Cambios' button visible.
qa_results.QA10_permissions_grid_admin: PASS — Permisos de Mesero section (with Switch toggles) is visible after selecting a role when logged in as admin level 100
qa_results.QA12_cross_viewport: NOT TESTED — only Desktop 1920x1080 verified; Create/Edit dialogs use max-h-[85vh] overflow-y-auto so should be fine, but explicit 768/375 not run
qa_results.select_role_autoload: PASS — clicking each role triggers handleSelectRole and notify.success toast appears with count

action_items: Fix nested <button> inside role-option <button> (hydration error). Replace inner pencil <button> with <span role='button' tabIndex={0}> or restructure.
Sync ROLE_DEFAULTS.admin (frontend) with backend DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS (admin should have 70 perms not 63) — frontend PERMISSION_CATEGORIES is missing some permission keys.
Dedupe or delete the leftover custom 'ADMINISTRADOR' role with code=administrador, level 80, 0p (test seed leftover).
Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to Create/Edit Role dialogs.
(Optional) Cleanup the seed custom role 'TestQA_Auto' created during this QA run.
critical_code_review_comments: UserConfig.js is 1082 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; should be split into smaller modules (RoleSelector, PermissionsGrid, CreateRoleDialog, EditRoleDialog).
Duplicate permission-category rendering code in Create dialog and Edit dialog (~50 lines each) — extract a shared <PermissionCategoryAccordion> component.
The dedup filter at line 709-716 only excludes builtin codes; case-insensitive label match would prevent the ADMINISTRADOR duplicate.

ROLE_DEFAULTS.admin is dynamically computed from PERMISSION_CATEGORIES dict — this drifts from backend DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS.admin which has 70. Either centralize the source-of-truth in backend and fetch it, or sync the frontend categories dict.
seed_data_creation: Created custom role 'TestQA_Auto' (level 20, 0 perms) via Create Puesto dialog. Recommend cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Route is /user/:userId — for new user use /user/new (NOT /settings/users/new which redirects to /dashboard). Login via keypad: click each PIN digit then 'ENTRAR'. Use page.wait_for_load_state('domcontentloaded') NOT 'networkidle' (service worker keeps network alive). Custom role 'TestQA_Auto' was created during this run and may need cleanup. The duplicate 'ADMINISTRADOR' custom role and 'TestRole' custom role are leftover test data. To verify QA8 properly, in Create dialog DON'T click already-expanded category buttons before toggling individual perm switches.
rca of the issue: Main user-reported bug ('al seleccionar puesto los permisos no se cargaban automaticamente') is FIXED. Verified: handleSelectRole (line 373) correctly applies ROLE_DEFAULTS for builtin roles, role.permissions for custom roles with saved perms, and CUSTOM_ROLE_DEFAULTS fallback for custom roles with empty perms. Toast confirms perm count on each click. Badges in role-option buttons (line 720-725) compute permCount from same source so display matches the actual loaded perms.
